description: Display a video from a URL, base64 data URL, or signable storage path.

src.description: Video URL, base64 data URL, or signable storage path (e.g., "s3://bucket/clip.mp4")

objectFit.description: How the video fits its container

controls.description: Whether to show native playback controls

autoPlay.description: Whether the video starts playing automatically

loop.description: Whether the video loops after ending

muted.description: Whether the video is muted (required for autoplay in most browsers)

playsInline.description: Whether the video should play inline on mobile devices

poster.description: Poster image URL shown before playback starts

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "border-radius: 8px")

propsSchema.description: Displays a video from a URL, base64 data URL, or signable storage path.
